headline: Fractional Design Partner for early-stage teams shipping tech for good.
bio: I'm Guil, a creative director and brand designer based in Berlin. I partner with founders and small teams to turn rough ideas into products people actually want to use, from brand strategy to shipped pixels.

My background spans creative direction at General Magic, co-founding Regens Unite, and years of video and motion work at N26. These days I'm drawn to projects at the intersection of design, community, and decentralized systems. Work that deepens our connection with each other and the world around us.

name: General Magic
summary: A group of Web3 professionals exclusively supporting public goods and crypto‑philanthropic organizations that create greater value for society. We do that by building digital products, governance systems, and economic models.

name: Citizen Wallet
summary: An open‑source crypto wallet for community currencies that leverages account abstraction, catering to the non‑web3 audience. No sign‑up, no setup required, no gas fees. Anyone can do it.
